title: Is this song anywhere inside the series EoE Rebuild
display_title: Is this song anywhere inside the series EoE Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: Is this song anywhere inside the series/EoE/Rebuild? Post by Fernando » Sat Aug 16, 2014 8:39 pm I have this strong feeling of having heard this toccata by Paradisi (and especially its ending) somewhere inside Eva, but I'm not quite sure where. Does it give you the same feeling/do you know where to look? Here is an execution: [url]https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vihM0HbuiPI[/url] Thanks for your help[/url]

[]: Post by NemZ » Sun Aug 17, 2014 5:09 am Doesn't sound familiar at all, sorry.

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Aug 17, 2014 5:18 am That doesn’t don’t appear in any Anno-directed Eva material. (I’m not sure of it shows up in things like Eva Puchi or not.) Are you sure you’re not confusing it with this song ?

[]: Post by Fernando » Sun Aug 17, 2014 8:30 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: That doesn’t don’t appear in any Anno-directed Eva material. (I’m not sure of it shows up in things like Eva Puchi or not.) Are you sure you’re not confusing it with this song ?
